title: CORE — Reproductive History
description: Menstrual, pregnancy, breastfeeding, contraceptive, menopause and HRT history. Pregnancy/birth slots are stored wide; inapplicable slots take 666 (fewer than N full-term pregnancies) or 777 (nonparous). The cross-field skip rules are enforced at the table level (see core.schema.json).

agemenarche.title: Age at menarche
agemenarche.$comment: Source coding: Age in years; 777 - Never had a period; 888 - Missing/Unknown.

age_preg1.title: Age at first pregnancy (full-term)
age_preg1.$comment: Source coding: Age in years; 777 - Nonparous; 888 - Missing/Unknown.

parity.title: Number of pregnancies (full-term)
parity.description: See COHORT_METADATA.preg_def for the cohort's definition of full-term pregnancies.
parity.$comment: Source coding: 0+; 888 - Missing/Unknown. Open-ended count, not a closed enum. No nonparous sentinel: a non-parous participant is expected to record 0.

age_preg5.title: Age at fifth pregnancy (full-term)
age_preg5.$comment: 666 - N/A (<5 pregnancies); 777 - Nonparous; 888 - Missing. (Source label has a stray 'first'.)

age_preg6.title: Age at sixth pregnancy (full-term)
age_preg6.$comment: 666 - N/A (<6 pregnancies); 777 - Nonparous; 888 - Missing. (Source label has a stray 'first'.)

breastfeed.title: Ever breastfeed
breastfeed.$comment: Source coding: 0 - Never Breastfed; 1 - Ever Breastfed; 777 - Nonparous; 888 - Missing/Unknown.

breastfeed_dur.title: Cumulative lifetime duration of breastfeeding (months)
breastfeed_dur.description: Enter 0 if parous and did not breastfeed.
breastfeed_dur.$comment: Source coding: Time in months; 777 - Nonparous; 888 - Missing/Unknown.

breastfeed_dur_b1.title: Duration of breastfeeding (months) for first birth
breastfeed_dur_b1.description: Enter 0 if parous and did not breastfeed for the first birth.
breastfeed_dur_b1.$comment: Source coding: Time in months; 777 - Nonparous; 888 - Missing/Unknown.

breastfeed_dur_b2.title: Duration of breastfeeding (months) for second birth

breastfeed_dur_b3.title: Duration of breastfeeding (months) for third birth

breastfeed_dur_b4.title: Duration of breastfeeding (months) for fourth birth

breastfeed_dur_b5.title: Duration of breastfeeding (months) for fifth birth

breastfeed_dur_b6.title: Duration of breastfeeding (months) for sixth birth

breastfeed_dur_b7.title: Duration of breastfeeding (months) for seventh birth

breastfeed_dur_b8.title: Duration of breastfeeding (months) for eighth birth

breastfeed_dur_b9.title: Duration of breastfeeding (months) for ninth birth

breastfeed_dur_b10.title: Duration of breastfeeding (months) for tenth birth

ocuse_ever.title: Ever use of oral contraceptives
ocuse_ever.$comment: Source coding: 0 - Never used oral contraceptives; 1 - Ever used oral contraceptives; 888 - Missing/Unknown.

ocuse_current.title: Current OC use (at record_date)
ocuse_current.$comment: Source coding: 0 - No; 1 - Yes; 888 - Missing/Unknown. (No nonuser sentinel defined.)

ocuse_dur.title: Lifetime duration of oral contraceptive use (months)
ocuse_dur.$comment: Source coding: Time in months; 777 - NA (never user); 888 - Missing/Unknown.

ocuse_start.title: Age at first use of oral contraceptive
ocuse_start.$comment: Source coding: Age in years; 777 - NA (never user); 888 - Missing/Unknown.

ocuse_stop.title: Age at last use of oral contraceptive
ocuse_stop.description: Age in years if stopped before reference date.
ocuse_stop.$comment: Source coding: 666 - Current user; 777 - NA (never user); 888 - Missing/Unknown.

othcontracep_ever.title: Use of other types of hormonal contraceptives

othcontracep_current.title: Current use of other types of hormonal contraceptives
othcontracep_current.$comment: Source coding: 0 - No; 1 - Yes; 777 - NA (never user); 888 - Missing/Unknown.

meno_status.title: Menopausal status
meno_status.description: See COHORT_METADATA.menoage_def for how age of menopause and/or menopausal status was defined.
meno_status.$comment: Source coding: 1 - Postmenopausal; 2 - Premenopausal [source spells 'Premenopuasal']; 3 - Perimenopausal/other; 888 - Missing/Unknown. NOTE: this 1=Post/2=Pre coding is INVERTED relative to MAMMOGRAPHIC_DENSITY.MamMenoStat (1=Pre/2=Post).

meno_age.title: Age at menopause (years)
meno_age.description: Surgically/medically induced menopause can occur well before the typical natural range.
meno_age.$comment: Source coding: Age in years; 777 - Premenopausal at questionnaire; 888 - Missing/Unknown.

meno_reason.title: Reason for menopause
meno_reason.$comment: Source coding: 1 - Natural; 2 - Surgical; 3 - Radiation/Chemotherapy induced; 4 - Medication; 5 - Artificial/Induced (no detail); 777 - NA (premenopausal); 888 - Missing/Unknown.

hrtuse.title: Use of any hormone replacement therapy

hrt_dur.title: Lifetime duration of any hormone replacement therapy (months)

hrtuse_ep.title: Use of E+P hormone replacement therapy

hrtep_dur.title: Lifetime duration of E+P hormone replacement therapy (months)

hrtuse_eonly.title: Use of E-only hormone replacement therapy

hrteonly_dur.title: Lifetime duration of E-only hormone replacement therapy (months)

age_preg_later.$comment: Age at the Nth full-term pregnancy. 666 - N/A (fewer than N full-term pregnancies); 777 - Nonparous; 888 - Missing.

bf_dur_later.$comment: Duration of breastfeeding (months) for the Nth birth. 666 - N/A (fewer than N full-term pregnancies); 777 - Nonparous; 888 - Missing.

hrt_use.$comment: Source coding: 0 - Never used hormone replacement therapy; 1 - Current use; 2 - Former use; 3 - Ever used (unknown current or former); 888 - Missing/Unknown.

hrt_duration.$comment: Lifetime duration in months. 666 - NA (premenopausal); 777 - Never user; 888 - Missing/Unknown.
